title: Connect your integrations

publish.description: Link qSortBy to third-party tools — manage your connected Klaviyo account and connect Google Analytics 4.

intro: The **Integrations** page links qSortBy to the third-party tools that feed it richer signals. This guide covers managing a connected Klaviyo account and connecting Google Analytics 4.

steps.heading: Review your Klaviyo connection
steps.body: Open **Integrations** from the left menu. **Klaviyo** shows here as **connected**. The card lists the linked **account** and the **granted scopes** — the exact permissions qSortBy was given. Select **Disconnect** if you ever need to revoke access and unlink the account.

els.text: Open Integrations from the left menu — Klaviyo shows as connected with its account and granted scopes.

notes.text: Review the granted scopes before you rely on an integration — they tell you exactly what data qSortBy can read.

steps.heading: Connect Google Analytics 4
steps.body: **Google Analytics 4** is not linked yet. Select **Connect** on its card to start the OAuth flow — you'll sign in to Google and approve the scopes qSortBy needs. Once connected, its engagement data feeds into your sorts alongside Shopify's.

els.text: Select Connect on the Google Analytics 4 card to sign in with Google and approve access.

outro: That's integrations: keep an eye on your connected Klaviyo account and its scopes, and connect Google Analytics 4 to fold its data into qSortBy's ranking.
